# Mad Hatter Chimney Sweep

## Business Overview
Mad Hatter Chimney Sweep is a professional chimney and fireplace service company serving the Greater Seattle area since 1979. Licensed, bonded, and insured in Washington State (WA License MADHAHL790LW).

## Contact
- Phone: (206) 274-6409
- Email: services@themadhatterchimneysweep.com
- Website: https://www.themadhatterchimneysweep.com
- Location: Bothell, WA 98011

## Services
- Chimney Sweep & Cleaning
- Chimney Inspection (Level 1, 2, and 3 CSIA-standard)
- Chimney Repair (masonry, crown, tuckpointing)
- Chimney Cap Installation
- Chimney Liner Installation (stainless steel and cast-in-place)
- Chimney Waterproofing
- Fireplace Cleaning
- Masonry Repair
- Dryer Vent Cleaning

## Service Area
Seattle, Bothell, Kirkland, Redmond, Bellevue, Everett, Woodinville, Kenmore, Shoreline, Edmonds, Lynnwood, Marysville, Snohomish, Monroe, Mill Creek, Mountlake Terrace, Mukilteo, Renton, Kent, Sammamish, Issaquah, Mercer Island, Newcastle, Lake Forest Park

## Hours
Monday–Friday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Saturday: 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM

## Credentials
- In business since 1979
- WA Contractor License: MADHAHL790LW
- CSIA-standard inspections
- 5-star rated, 247+ reviews
